case_title: GRETA MAE EVANS VS. JULIA FRANK et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, JULIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, GRETA MAE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, JULIA $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,400.00, CASE AGAINST CO-DEFENDANT MIKE GALLIN DIMSISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,400.00 FILED BY EVANS, GRETA MAE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, JULIA GALLIN, MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, GRETA MAE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED OCT-05-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, JULIA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2009 BY JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MIKE GALLIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-20-2009 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
